questions.question: Consider the following events in the history of India: 1. Rise of Pratiharas under King Bhoja 2. Establishment of Pallava power under Mahendravarman-I 3. Establishment of Chola power by Parantaka-I 4. Pala dynasty founded by Gopala What is the correct chronological order of the above events, starting from the earliest time?

questions.question: Which of the following phrases defines the nature of the 'Hundi' generally referred to in the sources of the post-Harsha period?

options.A: An advisory issued by the king to his subordinates
options.B: A diary to be maintained for daily accounts
options.D: An order from the feudal lord to his subordinates
